Taste Profiles

The Malwa
Flavour Map

🔥
Fiery & Bold

The signature Ratlami heat — black pepper forward, ajwain-spiked, zero apologies given.

✨
Golden & Warm

Turmeric warmth, jeera notes and the gentle sweetness of Ujjain's sacred spice legacy.

🌿
Earthy & Complex

Twenty-two spices, one masterpiece. Jeeravan carries the whole forest in every pinch.

🧈
Buttery & Flaky

Mathri's rich crumbling layers melt into pepper and ghee — the taste of pure comfort.

The Origin Story

Two Indoris.
One Search.
No Results.

"We didn't start a company. We just couldn't find our sev online — and neither could anyone else from Indore."

Arpit, 32 — left Indore for undergrad in 2012, Masters in the USA, back in Bengaluru. Twelve years of carrying sev in his check-in luggage.

Ujjwal, 34 — twelve years in Pune, away from Indore. The parcel ritual never stopped. Namkeen always made the trip, even when he couldn't.

In January 2024, Arpit ran out of sev. Opened Blinkit. Searched "Ratlami Sev." Nothing. Ujjwal called — same problem in Pune. They had found the gap. Bhiya-O was the answer.

🧑‍💻
Arpit, 32
Indore → USA → Bengaluru
2012 to now — 12+ years away. Still carries sev in check-in luggage every trip home.
👨‍💼
Ujjwal, 34
Indore → Pune · 12 years away
12 years in Pune. Namkeen always made the journey — in bags, in parcels, in memories.
0

Heritage Cities

Real Ingredients
🎒
2012
Left Indore for the first time

Undergrad. First hostel. First time eating sev that wasn't from home. It wasn't the same — and there weren't words for why yet.

✈️
2016 – 2019
Masters in the USA. The parcel ritual begins.

Every two months, 8–10 kg arrived from Indore. Seventy percent of it was namkeen.

It crossed international customs. It survived the journey. It was irreplaceable.
🏠
2020 – 2022
Back in India. Same ritual, different city.

Bengaluru now. Ujjwal in Pune — 12 years away from Indore, still carrying namkeen every visit home. Some things don't change.

📱
January 2024
The moment that started everything

Ran out of sev. Opened Blinkit. Searched "Ratlami Sev." Nothing. Not a single brand from Indore on any quick commerce app.

Ujjwal called — same problem in Pune. They had found the gap. Bhiya-O was the answer.

How It's Made

Craft Over Speed.

We're not running a factory. We're running a flavour operation. Here's what actually happens before a packet reaches your door.

🌶️
01
The Hunt
Source the Good Stuff

Whole spices from Malwa's legendary mandis, sourced by name. No brokers, no mystery powders.

🪨
02
Old School Cool
Stone-Ground Fresh

Every batch gets freshly ground spices. Your nose will know the difference within two seconds of opening the packet.

👐
03
The Real Work
Made by Hand

Traditional methods, generational recipes, zero shortcuts. Slow? Yes. Worth it? Ask anyone who's opened a Bhiya-O packet.

📦
04
Final Boss
Sealed & Shipped

Sealed at peak freshness, dispatched within 48 hours. If it doesn't smell like a Malwa spice market — wrong standard, not ours.

Serving Ideas

Beyond the Packet.

Our namkeen isn't just a snack — it's a secret ingredient. Here's how Malwa elevates your everyday meals.

Uses Jeeravan
Morning Ritual
Indori Poha

Classic flattened rice, topped with a generous pinch of Jeeravan masala. The breakfast that built a city's reputation.

Uses Mathri
Evening Essential
Mathri Chai Time

Break a Mathri into your chai. Let it soak for 4 seconds. It is, arguably, the peak of human civilisation.

Uses Ratlami Sev
Street Style
Sev Chaat

Dahi, tamarind chutney, boiled potatoes, onions — topped with Ratlami Sev. Street food perfection in 5 minutes flat.

Uses Ujjaini Sev
Comfort Food
Sev Tamatar Sabzi

Tomato gravy, cumin tadka, topped with Ujjaini Sev just before serving. A Malwa staple that'll make your guests ask for the recipe.

Got Questions?

We've Got
Answers.

We ship pan-India via trusted courier partners. Orders are dispatched within 48 hours of being placed. Delivery typically takes 3–5 business days depending on your location. We'll send you a tracking link as soon as your order ships!
100% yes. No artificial preservatives, no palm oil, no mystery powders. Our namkeen is made fresh in small batches using traditional recipes and stone-ground spices — the same way it's been made in Malwa for generations. The only reason it lasts is because it gets eaten fast.
Our namkeen stays fresh for 60–90 days when stored in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. We seal everything fresh at the source and dispatch quickly so you get maximum shelf life from day one.
Absolutely! Our hampers (Malwa Starter, Full Indore, Spice Box) are gift-ready with beautiful packaging. For custom corporate gifting or bulk orders, reach out to us at [email protected] and we'll put together something special — personalised notes, custom quantities, branded boxes, whatever you need.
Jeeravan Masala and Mathri are very family-friendly — mild heat, loved by all age groups. Ujjaini Sev is a medium spice that most adults enjoy comfortably. Ratlami Sev is the fiery one — authentic, bold, and not for the faint-hearted (but absolutely worth it). Check the heat dots on each product card for guidance.
That's the only question that matters to us, and yes — it will. We source directly from Malwa, use the original recipes, and refuse to compromise on spices or technique. Multiple Indoris-abroad have told us it tastes exactly like home. That's the only review that counts.
